drl:
rule "R0"

    $p0_0 : T0(f1 matches "aal", !(f1 <= "zz"), $b0_0_0 : f0, $b0_0_1 : f0)

rule "R1"

rule "R2"
when
    (or (and T0(f0 != false, f0 != true) T0(f1 matches "al", f1 in ("zz", "zz"), $b2_1_0 : f1, $b2_1_1 : f0) $p2_2 : T0($b2_2_0 : f0, $b2_2_1 : f0)) (and T0(f0 not in (false, true, false), f0 != true) T0(f1 matches "al", f1 in ("zz", "zz"), $b2_1_0 : f1, $b2_1_1 : f0) $p2_2 : T0($b2_2_0 : f0, $b2_2_1 : f0)) (and T0(f0 != true, f0 != true) T0(f0 != true, f1 matches "z?", $b2_1_0 : f1, $b2_1_1 : f0) $p2_2 : T0($b2_2_0 : f0, $b2_2_1 : f0)))

    delete($p2_2);

rule "R3"
salience 5

then

rule "R4"

rule "R5"

    ( $p5_0 : T0(!(f1 matches "zz?z+b?")) and not T1() )
